evals.prompt: Fix this exported conversation file: <export.txt> — it was exported from Claude Code and has broken line wrapping everywhere. Output the fixed version next to the original.
evals.expected_output: A *-fixed.txt file with correct line wrapping, intact table borders, matching marker counts, and fewer total lines than the input.

assertions.name: output_file_exists
assertions.description: The fixed output file was created successfully

assertions.name: line_count_reduced
assertions.description: Output has fewer lines than input. Reasonable reduction is 10-25%.

assertions.name: marker_counts_match
assertions.description: The count of ❯, ●, ✻, ⎿, and … characters in output matches input exactly

assertions.name: no_broken_table_borders
assertions.description: Every line starting with ┌/├/└ also contains the matching right border on the same line

assertions.name: no_runaway_joins
assertions.description: No output line exceeds 500 display-width characters

evals.prompt: 我从 Claude Code 导出了一个对话记录 <export.txt>，表格和段落的换行全部乱了。帮我修复一下，顺便看看统计数据——修了多少行？
evals.expected_output: Fixed file created with --stats output showing join counts per content type. Tables should be properly reconstructed with correct column padding.

assertions.name: output_file_exists
assertions.description: The fixed output file was created successfully

assertions.name: line_count_reduced
assertions.description: Output has fewer lines than input. Reasonable reduction is 10-25%.

assertions.name: marker_counts_match
assertions.description: The count of ❯, ●, ✻, ⎿, and … characters in output matches input exactly

assertions.name: no_broken_table_borders
assertions.description: Every line starting with ┌/├/└ also contains the matching right border on the same line

assertions.name: no_runaway_joins
assertions.description: No output line exceeds 500 display-width characters

assertions.name: stats_output_present
assertions.description: The run log contains statistics output with join counts (e.g., 'Table rows merged', 'Tool results fixed')
